race.comment: THERE WERE ROSES (8) can bounce back here. She looked good winning the maiden first up here over 1400m, beating a subsequent winner in Avenue Montaigne. She had excuses at Caulfield Heath last time when quickly up in grade and can bounce right back. PEARL KING (6) has been close up in two runs here this time in, beaten under a length each time. Drawn to get back but will be charging late. HEY BELLA (4) is in flying form, a winner of her past two starts over this track and distance. Bit more depth now but she's very hard to knock. BRILLANTEZZA (7) was an easy winner on debut at Wangaratta as favourite, finding the line strongly to score by two lengths. She can go on with it. GRAND SAGE (9) is racing consistently and should be right there again.
